hypothesisSummary.change: Escape hatch in query-clarification.ts gated by namedTargetGuardAutoBindOnResolved, activated via env DUAL_SURFACE_NAMED_TARGET_GUARD_AUTOBIND_ON_RESOLVED=on. Collapses partialCoverageClarificationCandidates when length<=1 OR all share same (toolId, methodName).
hypothesisSummary.gateConditionsObserved: Not met for any of q2/q8/q9/q10/q12/q17. Each has optionCount=3 with three distinct methodNames under the single toolId 294100e8-c648-4e5f-a254-95a14b56e398. length>1 fails; same-(toolId,methodName) fails because methodName varies. Auto-bind branch never fired.

optimizationReadiness.reason: Cluster named_target_without_resolution unchanged at 6 traces. Experiment 1 escape-hatch predicate never fired on the observed shape (optionCount=3 with distinct methodNames under one toolId).

Same failure cluster size and IDs as pre. Next hypothesis needs a predicate that handles optionCount>1 with distinct methodNames under a single toolId, or resolves the named target upstream of clarification.
Clarification mean rose 3.9 -> 5.0 due to analyzer scoring shape (gate firing per contract), not a runtime improvement. Do not mean-chase.
Analyzer calibration artifact: uniform execution=2 on successful iterative-execution traces depresses the mean. The drop 3.33 -> 2.17 reflects scoring-shape, not a real runtime regression.
Above automation floor. Minor lift vs pre (4.17).

dominantFailureClusters.label: named_target_without_resolution
dominantFailureClusters.description: Unchanged from pre-experiment. Each trace has optionCount=3 with three distinct methodNames under one toolId; the experiment's escape-hatch predicate could not fire.

preVsPostDelta.verdict: No measurable improvement. Gate predicate incompatible with observed clarification shape (optionCount=3 with distinct methodNames under one toolId).

interactionRisks: toolSelection <-> clarification: paired coupling unchanged; right dimension, wrong predicate.
Analyzer execution calibration artifact exaggerates the execution delta (3.33 -> 2.17); do not treat as a hard regression.
calibrationNotes: analyze-stage-traces.mjs assigns uniform execution=2 on successful iterative-execution traces (known artifact).
Clarification=5 is the gate firing per contract, not a runtime improvement.
paredFixHypothesisNotes: Next hypothesis should either (a) auto-bind clarification.recommendedOptionId when outcomeType=clarification_required AND recommendedOptionId is non-null AND the prompt is answerable AND the recommendation resolves to a grounded method on the already-selected toolId with no unresolvedRequiredParams; or (b) resolve the named target upstream so partial_clause_coverage does not trigger. Must remain contributor-agnostic and flag-gated.
